description: Enhanced Contact section with ultra-interactive design, more visual appeal, and additional decorative icons throughout the site for visual richness. Make the contact form more engaging with animated field focus states, social proof elements, availability indicator, and a more visually striking layout.
steps: 1. Rewrite src/sections/Contact.tsx with an enhanced layout: (a) Add a large decorative illustration/icon composition at the top or side using lucide-react icons arranged artistically, (b) Add an 'availability status' indicator showing current availability (green dot + 'Available for projects'), (c) Add quick-contact options (WhatsApp icon link, email icon link, schedule call button) as visually prominent cards before the form, (d) Improve form styling with glassmorphism background, larger input fields with icon prefixes (User icon for name, Mail icon for email, MessageSquare icon for message), (e) Add a subtle animated gradient border on form focus, (f) Add testimonial/social proof placeholder area below the form (a quote from a colleague), (g) Keep the existing form validation and submission logic intact. Restyle the sending/success/error states to be more visually appealing.

2. Add decorative icons throughout the site for visual richness: In src/sections/Hero.tsx add subtle floating icon decorations (Code2, Palette, Sparkles from lucide-react) positioned absolutely with CSS animations (gentle float). In src/sections/About.tsx add relevant icons next to section headings and skill items. In the footer area of src/App.tsx add social/tech icons. Keep all icons from lucide-react (already installed, tree-shakes well).

3. In src/index.css, add CSS keyframe animation classes for floating icons: @keyframes float-gentle { 0%,100% { transform: translateY(0); } 50% { transform: translateY(-10px); } }. Add .animate-float-gentle, .animate-float-gentle-delayed (with animation-delay). Add a subtle gradient border animation class for the contact form.

4. Update src/locales/en.json with new keys: sections.contact.availability, sections.contact.availabilityStatus, sections.contact.quickContact, sections.contact.whatsapp, sections.contact.scheduleCall, sections.contact.testimonial, sections.contact.testimonialAuthor, sections.contact.testimonialRole. Update id.json and zh.json accordingly.
acceptance_criteria: Contact section has a visually striking redesign with availability indicator
Quick-contact options (WhatsApp, email, schedule) are visible as cards
Form inputs have icon prefixes and glassmorphism styling
Decorative floating icons appear in Hero section
About section has relevant icons next to headings/skills
CSS float animations work smoothly without JS overhead
All existing form validation and submission logic still works
findings: All acceptance criteria met. Contact section has availability indicator (green pulsing dot), quick-contact cards (WhatsApp, Email, Schedule Call), glassmorphism form with icon prefixes, testimonial/social proof area, and gradient border animation. Hero section has floating decorative icons (Code2, Palette, Sparkles) with CSS animations. About section has icons next to skill headings (Zap for soft skills, Layers for hard skills). Footer has Heart, Coffee, and Globe icons. All CSS float animations use pure keyframes with no JS overhead. Form validation and formspree.io submission logic fully preserved.
